prompt_text:
### Demographics: 58-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating; Nausea and reduced appetite over the last 1-2 months after starting injections.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 105.7 kg; Height 176.3 cm; BMI 34.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.7%; 9 months ago 6.5%; 6 months ago 6.9%; 3 months ago 6.5%; current 6.9%), FPG (12 months ago 157mg/dL; 9 months ago 155mg/dL; 6 months ago 163mg/dL; 3 months ago 143mg/dL; current 160mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 107.3kg; 9 months ago 104.9kg; 6 months ago 105.2kg; 3 months ago 105.3kg; current 105.7kg), Height (12 months ago 176.3cm; 9 months ago 176.3cm; 6 months ago 176.3cm; 3 months ago 176.3cm; current 176.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 34.0kg/m²; current 34.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 135mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 15U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 17U/L), AST (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 28U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 71mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 74mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 70mL/min/1.73m²; current 71mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 68mg/g; 9 months ago 64mg/g; 6 months ago 91mg/g; 3 months ago 66mg/g; current 86mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 98mg/dL; 9 months ago 101mg/dL; 6 months ago 102mg/dL; 3 months ago 99mg/dL; current 100mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 55mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 97mg/dL; 3 months ago 114mg/dL; current 106mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 16.0g/dL; 9 months ago 15.2g/dL; 6 months ago 15.0g/dL; 3 months ago 15.8g/dL; current 15.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
